name: Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat granulated sugar and vanilla until smooth.
3. Add eggs and oil; mix well.
4. Grate about 10 medium carrots using a food processor and pulse several sections to chop (do not puree). Add grated carrots to the mixture.
5. Combine cake flour, baking soda, salt, apple cider vinegar, and lemon extract with the sugar mixture. Mix at medium speed for 2 minutes.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13-inch pan.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Remove cake from the oven and let cool on a rack until completely cool.
9. Prepare frosting: Beat softened margarine, cream cheese, confectioner's sugar, and lemon extract (1 teaspoon with water to make 1 tablespoon) until light and fluffy. Spread over the cooled cake and refrigerate before serving.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
